title: AWS SNS Publish (query-encoded request, XML response)
description: SNS's Publish action uses the AWS "query" protocol: the SDK POSTs a form-urlencoded body (Action=Publish&TopicArn=...&Message=...) to the service root. Point the SDK at Lyrebird via AWS_ENDPOINT_URL (or aws.Config.BaseEndpoint), and it will sign the request with dummy credentials — Lyrebird never verifies the SigV4 signature. This recipe matches ANY POST to "/", so install only one query-protocol recipe (SNS or SQS) at a time unless you add a distinguishing header/priority.
